body_txt: A child was born, who wasn't supposed to be born ; this is due to many different factors (e.g. One-Night-Stand Pregnancy , Child by Rape ). Whatever the cause and effect, there is one thing for sure: the child is a "mistake", and more often than not, that child is made painfully aware of that fact, especially by a Resentful Guardian who is trapped in what would likely be a Shotgun Wedding . If the child takes it badly, could eventually lead to Bastard Bastard , Betrayal by Offspring , and even Self-Made Orphan in the worst of the cases. Compare Surprise Pregnancy , in which the offspring is not necessarily considered a "mistake" (but also overlaps this), just unplanned, and That Thing Is Not My Child! , in which the "mistake" is rejected by one ( or both ) of the parents. Contrast The Baby Trap , in which the "mistake" is made with the main purpose of And Now You Must Marry Me . See also Teen Pregnancy , the Law of Inverse Fertility , and But We Used a Condom! .
